# files_holiday_calendar (Resource)

A Holiday Calendar defines site-wide holiday dates and optional partial-day windows that scheduled resources skip.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "files_holiday_calendar" "example_holiday_calendar" {
  name = "Company Holidays"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Holiday Calendar name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation time.
- `definition` (Dynamic) Holiday rules for the calendar. For more information, refer to the Holiday Calendars section of the Files.com documentation.
- `id` (Number) Holiday Calendar ID. Use `custom_<id>` as a scheduled resource's `holiday_region`.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update time.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Holiday Calendars can be imported by specifying the id.
terraform import files_holiday_calendar.example_holiday_calendar 1
```
